Protein families: Class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, CLNMT methyltransferase family
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class I-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. CLNMT methyltransferase family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=[calmodulin]-L-lysine + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = [calmodulin]-N(6)-methyl-L-lysine + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:21556, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:11360, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:11361, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:29969, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:61929; EC=2.1.1.60; Evidence={ECO:0000250|UniProtKB:Q6GQ33};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the trimethylation of calmodulin (PubMed:24285794). Regulates roots development probably by modulating auxin signaling responses. May be involved in gravitropism. Involved in abscisic acid (ABA)-mediated and abiotic stress responses, including salt (NaCl), cold, drought and heat stresses (PubMed:24285794). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:24285794}.
